I couldn't help myself. Waiter, waiter! More demi-humans please! Okay I have very specific tastes when it comes to demi-human stuff. So basically demi-humans (in my mind) are kinda like pets or second class citizens? Basically they need a human around to watch them, though they have human intelligence. Demi-humans are DIFFERENT from regular cats and dogs, which still exists ☝️🤓

Mmmm only Toya and Harumichi mentioned. "But sigma, why Harumichi?" CUZ HE'S THE OWNER OF USER AND TOYA, NOT HIS DAD IN THIS ONE!!!
